title: Skeletons Improve Over Time
description: Skeletons get stronger the longer you play. Buffs include increasing health, speed, improving their armor and bows, etc.
body:
# Skeletons Improve Over Time
This datapack makes skeletons stronger the longer you play. difficulty is calculated for each player separately. Skeletons's health, follow range, armor, bows, etc. improves the longer you play. The improvements are gradual, increasing very slightly every 20 minutes.

## NOTICE: This datapack is discontinued, instead use the Hostile Mobs Improve Over Time datapack: https://modrinth.com/datapack/hostile-mobs-improve-over-time 

### Stat Increase
Stats that change include:
- Health
- Follow range
- Movement speed
- Armor toughness
Other changes:
- Enchanted Bows (power, punch, flame)
- Armor
- Enchanted Armor
- Shields
- Skeletons after day 20 (20*20 minutes) gain the ability to switch to an iron sword if player gets too close, and switch back to a bow if player gets farther away
### Timers
Timer for difficulty is per player, and increases every minecraft day (20 minutes). sleeping does NOT forward this timer. Max difficulty is day 100+ and difficulty does not increase after that.
### Commands
To test out how hard the skeletons are, use functions skel:day25, skel:day50, skel:day75, skel:day100 or use command: /scoreboard players set <player> Skeldif <number>. To reset your score use skel:reset, to reset all of players difficulty, use skel:resetall
### Installing
Like your ordinary datapack, put zip file in datapacks folder of your world.
### Unistalling
Run function skel:uninstall and remove the datapack from datapacks folder
### Other
I am planning on making a version of this datapack for each common mob, then making a datapack consisting of all of them (This is the second mob improvement datapack I made)

### There is now Hostile mobs improve over time datapack which includes this + many more hostile mobs, you can download it here - https://modrinth.com/datapack/hostile-mobs-improve-over-time - but if you wish to play with only some of them, links are below

<details>

All of them are compatible with eachother, and I recommend you play with all of them for the best experience.
